faqPage.title: Cov Lus Nug
faqPage.q1: 1. Koj muaj txoj cai them nqi li cas?
faqPage.a1: Peb them $100 flat them rau txhua qho muag, thiab qhov no yog ib qho ntawm cov kev them nqi siab tshaj plaws.
faqPage.q2: 2. Sij hawm ntev npaum li cas thiaj pom kev muag hauv kuv tus account?
faqPage.a2: Yuav tsum tshwm sim tam sim.
faqPage.q3: 3. Kuv nyuam qhuav muag tau. Kuv yuav saib qhov twg?
faqPage.a3_step2: Ntawm sab xis hauv qab koj yuav pom qhov xaiv Saib Nplooj Koom Txhais.
faqPage.a3_step3: Ntawm no koj tuaj yeem pom txhua qhov them tos thiab tso cai.
faqPage.q4: 4. Kuv paub ib tus neeg xav tau hosting. Kuv yuav tau txiaj ntsig li cas?
faqPage.a4_step2: Qhia mus rau hauv qab saib koj txuas koom txhais.
faqPage.a4_step3: Xa txuas no rau koj tus phooj ywg xav tau hosting.
faqPage.a4_step4: Thaum lawv nyem qhov txuas ntawd thiab txiav txim account nrog peb, koj tau txiaj ntsig.
faqPage.q5: 5. Kuv tau pom zoo rau InterServer Hosting kev sib koom txhais. Tam sim no kuv yuav ua dab tsi?
faqPage.a5_step1: Nkag mus rau koj tus account koom txhais mus rau cov kev ua si InterServer los nyem tab Banners thiab Links.
faqPage.a5_step2: Xaiv cov kev ua si uas koj xav ntxiv rau koj lub vev xaib.
faqPage.a5_step3: Koj yuav pom cov koos banner ntawm sab xis ntawm txhua qhov banner; luam thiab muab cov koos no rau koj lub vev xaib.
faqPage.a5_step4: Thaum ib tus neeg nyem qhov txuas ntawd thiab yuav tus account hosting, koj tau txiaj ntsig.
faqPage.q6: 6. Kuv puas tuaj yeem PPC bid los txhawb InterServer Hosting?
faqPage.a6_line1: Tau, tab sis thov tsis txhob bid rau peb lub npe koom haum, kev hloov ntawm peb lub npe koom haum, kev sau yuam kev, lossis ib lub lus tseem ceeb twg uas muaj ib feem ntawm nws suav nrog InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Tsom mus rau cov lus tseem ceeb xws li fast hosting, PHP hosting, WordPress hosting.
faqPage.a6_line3: Thov hu rau peb yog tias koj xav tau kev pab tshawb nrhiav cov lus tseem ceeb.
faqPage.a6_line4: Ntxiv InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting raws li cov lus tseem ceeb tsis zoo.
faqPage.q7: 7. Kuv muag tau lawm. Thaum twg kuv thiaj li tau nyiaj?
faqPage.a7_line1: Tom qab 90 hnub ib qho kev muag siv tau yuav hloov los ntawm xwm txheej Qhov Qub mus rau Tab Tom Tos.
faqPage.a7_line2: Thaum kev muag Tab Tom Tos nws yuav raug them thaum 7 hnub xub thawj ntawm lub hlis.
faqPage.q8: 8. Kuv muaj kev muag tab tom tos uas tsis tau them.
faqPage.a8_line1: Tej zaum muaj ob peb laj thawj. Tej zaum peb xav tau sijhawm ntau dua los txheeb xyuas kev muag.
faqPage.a8_line2: Ib qho yooj yim los tshuaj xyuas yog kom xyuas tias koj txoj kev them nqi tau teeb.
faqPage.q9: 9. Kuv cov kev muag/them yuav tos ntev npaum li cas txog thaum tau pom zoo?
faqPage.q10: 10. Kuv puas tuaj yeem siv kuv txuas koom txhais rau kev xa tus kheej rau cov account kuv siv rau kev siv tus kheej?
faqPage.a10: Tsis tau. Kev sib cuam tshuam nrog tus account muag rov qab yuav ua rau kev muag tsis ua tiav.
faqPage.q11: 11. Vim li cas kuv tus them tau raug tsis lees txais?
faqPage.a11_intro: Tsis lees txais txhais tau tias tus them tau tsis ua tiav mus li.
faqPage.a11_reasons: Qee qhov laj thawj rau qhov no yuav yog:
faqPage.a11_reason1: Tus neeg siv twb tau sau npe nrog peb yav dhau los.
faqPage.a11_reason2: Tib txoj kev them nqi tau siv raws lwm tus account.
faqPage.a11_reason3: Lub system nrhiav tau tias koj, tus koom txhais, kuj siv tus account ntawm tus neeg siv.
faqPage.a11_policy: Txij li peb them $100 rau txhua qho muag feem ntau ntau dua peb tau rov qab los ntawm tus neeg siv txawm tom qab 1 xyoo, peb muaj txoj cai nruj kom ntes tau cov xa tsis ua tiav peb cov lus qhia. Yog tias koj xa phooj ywg lossis neeg siv, tsuas muab txuas lossis coupon rau lawv xwb. Tsis txhob qhia txoj kev them nqi thiab tsis txhob siv tus account.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Kuj thov rov saib peb cov lus cog tseg koom txhais ntawm no:
faqPage.q12: 12. Kuv yog tus tsim thiab yuav xa cov neeg siv. Puas tau?
faqPage.a12_line1: Txoj kev no yuav tsis ua haujlwm nrog peb (lossis lwm txoj kev sib koom txhais hosting). Thaum muaj cov kev sib phim tau ua ntawm ntau tus account, cov them tsis ua tiav.
faqPage.a12_line2: Qhov no ua kom tiv thaiv tib tus neeg txij li sau npe thiab tau nyiaj ntawm peb txoj kev sib koom txhais los ntawm kev xa tus kheej.
faqPage.a12_line3: Koj tej zaum xav txog kev hosting cov neeg siv ncaj qha thiab them nqi koj tus kheej siv dab tsi xws li PayPal. Koj tuaj yeem yuav tus account reseller hosting los ntawm peb thiab pib.
faqPage.q13: 13. Kuv yuav teeb txoj kev them nqi qhov twg?
faqPage.a13: Koj tuaj yeem teeb txoj kev them nqi,
faqPage.a13_clickHere: los ntawm kev nyem ntawm no
